calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Ben Hamburg, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JONES, SCHILLER & CO., LLP.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CLAIRE KOZEL.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Robert Schiller sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
Court ordered declarations filed in support of request for Default Judgment are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $33,942.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,979.60
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $355.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $40,276.60
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
